description: Happy Path: John Doe from MediFlow (matched across Email + LinkedIn + WhatsApp + SMS)
subject: Available for Tech Round?
body:
Hi Shivam,

Are you free tomorrow afternoon to discuss the role in more detail? I can do 2 PM or 4 PM PST.

Looking forward to it!

John

description: Same-Name Conflict: John Doe from FinCore (different person, should NOT merge with MediFlow John)
subject: Re: FinTech Backend Role
body:
Hi Shivam,

Just checking in - did you get a chance to review the FinCore role I sent last week?

Would love to set up a time to chat.

John

description: Different Person: Sarah Lee from TechStartup
subject: Re: Founding Engineer Opportunity
body:
Hey Shivam,

Our CEO is available for a call tomorrow at 3 PM. Does that work for you?

We'd love to discuss the founding engineer role and our vision.

Sarah

description: Unknown Sender: New person with no history
subject: AI/ML Engineer Position
body:
Hi Shivam,

I came across your profile and think you'd be a great fit for our AI/ML team. We're working on cutting-edge LLM applications.

Would you be interested in learning more?

Alex Johnson
CTO, NewCompany
